memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer). The record skips to the son of Henry, Herbert FitzHenry (Herbert FitzHerbert I, and his son Herbert FitzHerbert (II).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Piers FitzHerbert於大約1163年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Herbert FitzHerbert39歲，母親Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester29歲。他於1203年11月28日與Alice FitzRobert在英國艾可可拉維林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1235年6月1日在英國波克夏雷亞丁享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏雷亞丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Piers FitzHerbert于大约1163年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Herbert FitzHerbert39岁，母亲Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester29岁。他于1203年11月28日与Alice FitzRobert在英国艾可可拉維林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1235年6月1日在英国波克夏雷亞丁享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏雷亞丁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Piers FitzHerbert was born about 1163, in Wales, his father, Herbert FitzHerbert, was 39 and his mother, Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester, was 29. He married Alice FitzRobert on 28 November 1203, in Clavering, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 June 1235, in Reading, Berkshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Piers FitzHerbert est né environ 1163, à Galles, son père, Herbert FitzHerbert, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice FitzRobert le 28 novembre 1203, à Clavering, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1235, à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Piers FitzHerbert um 1163 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert FitzHerbert 39 und seine Mutter Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester 29. Er hat am 28. November 1203 in Clavering, Essex, England Alice FitzRobert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juni 1235 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Reading, Berkshire, England und wurde in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers FitzHerbert è nato il circa 1163 nel Galles, il suo padre, Herbert FitzHerbert, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Alice FitzRobert il 28 novembre 1203, nel Clavering, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1235, nel Reading, Berkshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Reading, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Piers FitzHerbertが約1163年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Herbert FitzHerbertは39歳，母Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucesterは29歳であった。1203年11月28日にイギリスエセックスクラバーイングでAlice FitzRobertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1235年6月1日にイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Piers FitzHerbert(이)가 대략 1163년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert FitzHerbert(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1203년 11월 28일 영국 에세스 클레이버링에서 Alice FitzRobert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1235년 6월 1일 영국 버크실르 리딩에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 리딩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers FitzHerbert nasceu aproximadamente 1163, em Gales, seu pai, Herbert FitzHerbert, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice FitzRobert em 28 de novembro de 1203, em Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1235, em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Piers FitzHerbert родился около 1163 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Herbert FitzHerbert было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice FitzRobert 28 ноября 1203 г. в местности клавиринг, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 июня 1235 г. в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Piers FitzHerbert nació aproximadamente 1163, en Gales, su papá, Herbert FitzHerbert, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lucy FitzMiles of Gloucester, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alice FitzRobert el 28 de noviembre de 1203, en Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1235, en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
